name: VolatilityRegimeStrategy
description: Regime-aware options strategy that selects iron condors, credit spreads, or stands aside based on the current implied-volatility level. Applies a skew adjustment to put strikes in elevated-IV environments to capture put-skew premium. Includes rolling, stop-loss, and portfolio-delta controls.

lowVolThreshold.description: IV below this → low regime (tight condor)

midVolThreshold.description: IV below this → mid regime (standard condor)

highVolThreshold.description: IV above this → stand aside entirely

lowDeltaTarget.description: Short-strike delta target in low regime

midDeltaTarget.description: Short-strike delta target in mid regime

highDeltaTarget.description: Short-strike delta target in high regime

profitTargetPct.description: Roll / close when P&L reaches this fraction of max profit

stopLossMult.description: Exit when loss exceeds initial credit × this multiplier

maxPortfolioDelta.description: Maximum allowed net portfolio delta before new entries are blocked

maxOpenPositions.description: Hard cap on concurrent open positions

volRankEntryMin.description: Minimum IV-rank percentage required for entry

premiumFloor.description: Minimum net credit per spread to justify the trade ($)

skewAdjustment.description: Put-strike downshift when IV is above mid threshold ($)

minDte.description: Minimum days to expiry at entry

maxDte.description: Maximum days to expiry at entry

rollDteThreshold.description: Roll position when DTE falls below this value

earningsBuffer.description: Do not enter within this many days before earnings
